历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 208 → 208 → 202 → 207 → 168. In 2025, the ranking significantly moved forward by about 39 places, with a cumulative forward movement of about 34 places over the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 168. The provincial science enrollment plan was 19 in 2021, 21 from 2022 to 2024, and 23 in 2025. The 2026 physics category plan is 23, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 6th (Top 6) in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable ranking of 5th to 6th in recent years, belonging to the top tier of national universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving cafeteria management (the King Crab incident) and the lack of dormitory provision for professional master's students. Douyin popularity ranking is 17th (high heat), with large short video exposure and relatively high application attention. In terms of historical admission anomalies, there was a medium attention signal in 2022 (differences in major group admission lines), but no obvious gaps in recent years. Nanjing University has 26 A-/A/A+ disciplines, including Astronomy A+, Geology A+, Atmospheric Science A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Foreign Languages and Literature A+, Physics A+, Chemistry A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, Business Administration A+, etc., with extremely strong disciplinary strength, which is highly attractive to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, and other advantageous engineering majors at Nanjing University continue to be highly recommended. Law is divided and under observation; finance/economics is divided and under observation. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the provincial general college entrance examination is 154,000 (an increase of about 32% from approximately 116,360 in 2025), with an estimated 110,800 physics category candidates, leading to significantly intensified competition. Nanjing University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, and is not a local university. Candidates from Inner Mongolia have a strong willingness to apply to top universities outside the province, and regional preference has a neutral impact on application heat.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the 2025 ranking has already significantly moved forward (168th), the 2026 enrollment plan remains unchanged, the number of physics category candidates in the province has increased sharply by about 32%, leading to intensified competition, and Nanjing University's sustained appeal as a top national university (Top 6), it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to move forward slightly from the 168th position. The predicted minimum ranking is about 158, with a range of 140–176.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 140), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors.
